	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 54 34 00 00 // ProcessType[main.indexMemberStruct]
	Return 
// 0x35ee: ProcessType[noalg.struct { key uint8; elem map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument }]

	Return
